---
title: "Georgina Mansfield"
---

## Georgina Mansfield

**Dates:** (b. 1868/9)

**Maiden name:** (Halliday)

### Description

niece of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

CMY wrote that her ‘husband is an army doctor in Africa'.

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th      [1900]
- Letter from March 27 [1900]
- Letter from May 8 th [1876]
- Letter from June 1st 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
